description: YouTrack offers a robust issue tracking experience with customizable workflows, agile project planning, and integration with development tools. While it has some limitations, its ease of use and scalability make it a popular choice among software development teams.
author: Akinwande M.
pros: This bug tracking software is remarkably easy to use, with a simple setup process and an intuitive interface that helps keep sprints clean, organized, and productive.
cons: A significant con of YouTrack is the absence of adequate learning tools. This made it difficult for me to quickly get up to speed and tap into the platform's vast potential.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I was very satisfied in using you track. It helped us to speed up processes
author: Filippo V.
pros: It is a very complete product, I appreciate the deep integration between the different part of the software
cons: It is difficult to set up user permission. Sometimes I was not sure on which user had access to what

review_title: Inexpensive alternative to Jira that is a great tool for a startup or SME
description: Overall, our transition to YouTrack from Jira / Confluence was at first a good cost conscious upgrade for our team. The smooth onboarding process of migrating documentation and tasks from Jira was quite straight forward. However, after some time using the product everyday it was obvious that it loaded extremely slow (even slower than Jira), this included changing ticket statuses, reporting new tickets, etc.
author: Tom B.
pros: Onboarding was seamless from Jira / Confluence into YouTrack. It was able to ingest all our existing tickets, comments, attachments, custom fields, etc. without almost any manual configuration.
cons: The UI is quite confusing and feels clunky. For example when you have multiple projects and looking for the "assigned to me" on individual projects, you have to navigate around before being able to then search. In our opinion.

review_title: A decent Project Management tool for small and medium size teams.
description: Youtrack provides almost all the features as compared to other competitors but still it lags behind in some cases. For example: It does not provide much flexibility for integrating with other non-technical softwares.Other than that, it integrates very well with other development tools like( github, gitlab etc)
author: R PREM K.
pros: YouTrack has the feature of customizable workflows and automation. You can customize workflow according to your team's requirement. Jira also has customizable workflows, but with YouTrack, you can customize the workflow using JavaScript. You can write JavaScript code in the built-in JavaScript editor and customize the workflow.
cons: YouTrack's mobile support is not that great. It doesn't provide all features same as that of desktop version. Jira provides almost every feature seamlessly in mobile version also.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Effective issue tracking for a creatives workflow
description: It’s enabled our team to juggle feedback loops and rounds of extreme editing faster, even keeping campaigns moving without losing little-yet-telling details in e-mail threads or spreadsheets.
author: Imogen R. A.
pros: YouTrack helps us stay organized between client projects, especially if we have multiple campaigns happening at once. I also appreciate we are able to easily customize task fields and workflows it’s flexible enough to mold around a marketing team, not just a tech team.
cons: It’s not the prettiest interface compared to some more visual tools, and it sometimes requires additional setup to make things feel especially intuitive quickly, plus for more creative projects.

review_title: THE BEST OF ALL TIMES TOOL FOR KEEPING TRACK OF ALL ACTIVITIES
description: Generally.. the platform is reliable and it is very adaptable
author: Bramwel M.
pros: The platform is very easy to use It is picket friendly Its ability to freely adapt the layout f the agile boards It is highly customizable It helps us track our clients work It is very straightforward
cons: Theres nothing wrong really with Youtrack it is genuinely the best

author: Andrew H.
pros: There is a lot to do in it to make all your work tasks efficient with it. I like the features to assign a task of a particular project to a member and to track your work done so far.
cons: Although I didn’t find any major lack in this software or faced any issues, the tracking module could have been better.

description: YouTrack can handle everything from simple task lists to complex agile projects with custom workflows. This adaptability is a huge plus for me as my needs evolve.
author: Matthew S.
pros: YouTrack offers a wide range of features, including issue tracking, agile boards, time tracking, and reporting.
cons: YouTrack is packed with features, which can be overwhelming for individuals or small teams with basic needs. It might feel like using a sledgehammer to crack a nut.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I use this software for reporting bugs and issues to the IT Team and since it is integrated with Slack, I take updates on the issue from there only. All this makes inter-team collaborations and discussions easier. However, I need the help of IT department itself to update my own tickets.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We can easily create tickets for reporting new bugs in any in-house software's, such as Content Management System, and since we can integrate YouTrack with Slack, these reports get auto-updated there as well.
cons: Finding the tickets related to me takes a little time due to 'Assigned to me' feature being moved from direct access.

description: My overall experience with the app is astounding in general as it also have unique and effective features compared to other apps that it is its counterparts.
author: Nikkolai S.
pros: It is the best app for managing projects and fixing bug or issues in the system of the workplace. It is also easy to use as it has a user-friendly or easy to use platform, whether what kind of level you do in being a tech-savvy.
cons: There are times when the app can load slowly because of the many features it has.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: YouTrack is a Great Choice for Project Management
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I adore how user-friendly and adaptable YouTrack is. It offers smooth connection with development tools and is both lightweight and powerful. It streamlines tracking and improves the effectiveness of project management!
cons: Setting up the permission hierarchy can be challenging and involve some trial and error. Furthermore, the PC version has more extensive support than the mobile version.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Make managing your project flexible with Youtrack
description: It is a dynamic tool which enables you to strike good balance in managing your projects. The customisation feature was really cool which allows to customise almost everything like workflows and all.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I would it is one of the most flexible tools in terms of project management. I liked the UI of the platform as it very is clean, fast and easy to understand.
cons: While is it a great tool, it can get little difficult for someone new to understand the functions and the learning curve is bit steep.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Extremely customisable and easy to use
author: Aakash P.
pros: Extremely easy to use and highly customisable for all our needs. It looks great and runs well. It makes it very use to use markdown. The search functionality is also very robust and works well
cons: There are times where you have issues with it loading correctly and it takes a few refreshes to sort out.

description: We love YouTrack now. We can't run our work without it. It has become the main concern for the team to solve issues and work on new tasks reported by the stakeholders.
author: Zohaib A.
pros: YouTrack offers the complete flexibility to do things that are out of the box like adding custom scripts to apply conditions to move a task or to integrate the whole software to a local attendance system using the APIs. If a user is highly enabled and equipped with customizing the features of YouTrack, almost anything can be done in aspects of project management. We have been using YouTrack for over 6 months and everybody has become used to it and happy with it because it has solved a big bunch of problems including the communication constraint.
cons: YouTrack should be more user-friendly. In order to become a happy user, one needs to use it for at least a month to understand the environment and do basic stuff like creating projects, boards, or reports. It would not be wrong if I call it intimidating but believe me, it's worth it. The complexity of usage pays off once YouTrack is practiced enough with consistency.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - have a great and smart search tool , you can search by more than one criteria in the same time and in one input by separate it by specials characters - have dynamic/ customize ticket workflow - have smart reporting tool and you can pin it dashboard - have cloud version and standalone
cons: - we did not find any direct integration with visual studio

review_title: Youtrack is a great workflow and task management tool.
description: I have been using Youtrack for more than 2 years, It's an excellent tool for managing tasks and workflows. The functions are really helpful, and the interface is really user-friendly. The capability to create custom workflows and generate custom fields is something I particularly appreciate. This is a fantastic project management tool.
author: Kushal R.
pros: Youtrack is a fantastic resource for keeping track of tasks and issues. The workflow is very team-oriented. I adore being able to assign tasks to particular team members and monitor their progress. This keeps projects well-organized and on schedule.
cons: Sometimes the user interface (UI) is slow and clunky. Some of My team members have found dissatisfaction with the way YouTrack resolves bugs and issues.

author: Ahmed F.
pros: Great super search feature and also good workflow customization
cons: Take a lot of memory and the UI need more enhancements

description: overall good, good toll for defect/enhancement tracking
author: Craig S.
pros: *mostly intuitive *multiple projects *ticket linking
cons: *user profile set up not intuitive *Field set up not consistent

author: Bishal D.
pros: I used YouTrack for managing my projects, and I was really impressed. It's super flexible, allowing me to change things like workflows and fields to fit exactly what my project needed. It was great because I could make it work just for us.
cons: Integrating it with other software required understanding complex technical details, which was a bit challenging for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The issue tracker for Jetbrains lovers
author: Andrea A.
pros: it is well integrated with all the toolset of Jetbrains, quite good integrated with VCS (github, bitbucket, etc).
cons: You cannot use this tool without being addicted to the jetbrains world

author: Hang X.
pros: it's some how configurable, it's really hard to list what I like the most about it
cons: nice try JetBrain! YouTrack is part of the JetBrain family, but i don't see the same quality in YouTrack in other software like PyCharm, this is hard to use, and you have to learn new query language to be an advance user

review_title: Excellent tool for modern agile software development
author: Somnath R.
pros: Excellent integration with Git. Customisable according to our needs and easy issue assignment or reassignment.
cons: The UI can be a bit better so as to help with the steep learning curve. Slightly costly software for small startups.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: For me this is the best issue management software so far. I've used others like Jira, but I really enjoy using Youtrack. Especially the query language is quite cool.
cons: I really can't think of any, maybe the settings page, it could use some redesign.

review_title: YouTrack helps to become more productive
author: Eugene K.
pros: After integration, the productivity of our team increased. Timesheet reports are helpful to improve team efficiency. Essential for sprints planning.
cons: There are a lot of features and our team needed a couple of weeks to get used to the functionality.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to add step by step progress Easy to manage my team
cons: UI isn't pretty, lends itself to be confusing because of the UI
